name: Bar-b-Barn Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, mix apple sauce, brown sugar, lemon juice, salt, pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and cinnamon.
2. Over medium-high heat, bring the mixture to a boil and continue boiling for one to two minutes.
3. Place parboiled ribs in an ovenproof dish and brush generously with the sauce.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
5. Turn the ribs and brush the underside with remaining sauce.
6. Continue baking for another 45 minutes.
7. Serves four.
From The Gazette, 90/12/19. Bar-B-Barn ribs are a Montreal favourite.
